programme.title: Celebrity Wheel Of Fortune S4
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: While investigating a brutal assault at Edgewater High, Sheriff Mickey Fox uncovers a disturbing web of secrets, lies and abuse of power at the school.

programme.title: Fire Country S4
programme.desc: Sharon is blindsided by a visit from her estranged mother, Ruby (Christine Lahti), whose sudden reappearance stirs up painful family history. Meanwhile, Bode and Jake respond to a call from a troubled teen in a condemned building.

programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. With the first immunity pin of the season on the line, protecting both the winning home cook and their region, the kitchen erupts into chaos and panic. One competitor ultimately faces elimination.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud S11
programme.desc: It's comedian Matt Rife and family versus rapper Lil Jon and family, and singer and actress Kat Graham and family versus actress Francia Raisa and family.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: When RV-lifestyle couple James and Michelle Butler go missing while camping along the southern coast of Texas, the discovery of human remains leads authorities to embark on an international manhunt to bring the fugitives to justice.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: As a jealous Barry (Troy Gentile) tries sabotaging the bond between Adam (Sean Giambrone) and Pops (George Segal), Erica (Hayley Orrantia) catches Murray (Jeff Garlin) in a lie during her college admission interview.

programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address.

programme.title: Once a Thief
programme.desc: A romantic and action-packed story of three best friends, a group of high-end art thieves, who come into trouble when a love-triangle forms between them

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: After failing in a Lion Dance competition, Dragon is sent away from school to find his errant brother.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A special agent is force to protect his daughter from a far against biotech mutants.

programme.title: A-X-L
programme.desc: A young racer discovers A.X.L. , a top-secret robotic dog that takes his life to an unusual turn when its creator wants A-X-L back

programme.title: Prison on Fire
programme.desc: Inside a Chinese prison two inmates form a friendship and face the difficulty of life on the inside.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: An MMA champion finds himself trapped in a prison in Thailand and is freedom depends on defeating a 400-pound killer in an underground match.

programme.title: Isabelle
programme.desc: A young couple's dream of starting a family shatters as they descend into the depths of paranoia and must struggle to survive an evil presence that wants nothing more than their very own lives.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman follows a lead to find his missing brother, he dives headlong into a twisted underworld of squatters and vagrants that threatens to tear apart his family as he struggles to maintain his sanity.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore why and how animals fight and reveal the ways in which they are programmed to survive at all costs.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Baby Giraffe meets the herd, the Zoo’s five otter brothers are on the move and the ectotherm team search for a hidden for a treasure.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, it's an anxious time for Zoo vets as they work to save one of the most endangered birds on the planet, and the ectotherm team are on a mission in the wild South Island.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Zoo welcomes two crocodiles to the Swamp Forest, the new South East Asia habitat opens and the team prepare for the birth of a baby southern white rhino.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Baby Giraffe meets the herd, the Zoo’s five otter brothers are on the move and the ectotherm team search for a hidden for a treasure.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: These animals live in the extremes but have created ingenious tools and techniques to cope with the harshest challenges to their continued survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren stops off at the historic city of Pretoria, where he visits the local farmers markets and cooks Koeksisters - South African sticky donuts - with Pastry Chef Nonkosi.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren is in the bustling city of Johannesburg, and his first stop is the vibrant township of Soweto. He’s taken on a tuk tuk tour by his guide Sindi, and cooks up his version of Chakalala, a South African vegetable relish.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Cheese Master Afrim Pristine begins his cheese expedition in the Alpine country of Switzerland, home of iconic classics like Gruyere and holey Swiss Emmental.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Eating cheese is a national pastime in France. Here, Afrim uncovers the rich histories of cheesemaking across the country from Paris to Normandy.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Dance Or Die
programme.desc: From underground clubs to global superstardom, Lady Gaga: Dance or Die explores the unstoppable rise of the pop icon who redefined music, fashion, and fame. Through triumphs and tribulations, witness how Gaga danced through life’s challenges — and won.

programme.title: Mariah Carey: Grit And Glamour
programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Laugh Until You Cry
programme.desc: The comic genius with an electric mind, with a range of talent that left us breathless. His story inspires us to look past the mask of those people who seem to have a perfect life. His legacy lives on.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Spring comes to the Dales and North York Moors National Parks, the season when the parks' animals must find food, a mate and raise a family.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Despite its delayed arrival, for the Grey Seals at Ravenscar Beach winter means it is time to give birth. The newborn pups are now on the fast track to adulthood, with just three weeks to gain as much weight as possible before their mothers move on.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: What if Bitcoin mining could actually save the world? Over this episode, we meet the local company on a mission to use it to help solve global warming.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: The Story Of Playstation
programme.desc: With video-games on the rise, Sony, the tech superpower would attempt a collaboration with Nintendo. After a shocking betrayal, Sony founded what would become the world’s most successful chain of video game consoles. The Playstation was here to stay.

programme.title: The Story Of Nintendo
programme.desc: From humble beginnings manufacturing 'Hanufuda' cards came one of the world's most recognised videogame companies and presenting itself as a platform for quality games and strong values. This is the story of Nintendo.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 3: Escape from Scare School Things worsen when a leprechaun, Razznik, steals the magical cleptor that now holds all of Scare School's powers. Power Outage – Part 4: The Final Battle On a hunt for ghostly powers, the evil leprechaun orders Deedstown to hand over Casper's uncles, OR ELSE.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghost in the Gallery After hearing reports of a ghost stealing artwork from the Deedstown Museum, Casper becomes convinced that his uncles are involved. Wart on the Nose When Professor Thurdigree Burns comes down with dragon flu, Casper, Mantha and Ra are tasked with finding a cure.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.desc: Sherman trades places with a kid Emperor and learns that being king is harder than it seems and Peabody's new co-host is out of control

programme.desc: When Peabody gets carried away trying to create the perfect band using historical friends, Sherman must stop him from becoming a music monster

programme.desc: Artephius and the orphans are alone in town when a Celtic thunder god demands to be let into the treasure house – or he will destroy San Lorenzo!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The whole gang escapes pursing Guards, battles flowing lava, and survives crumbling caves and pillars to finally make it back to the Forbidden City. Xiao is ready to escape the palace, but Shi Long has other plans for her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The gang learns of even bigger and direr forces working against the Empress and the Kingdom of China, and must come up with a plan to put a stop to it before it is too late.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: While riding back to Miradero, the girls get lost -- and Abigail's horse gets bitten by a snake! Can an old friend's skills help save the day?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil invents a simple new game called ball-in-cup, everyone except Hope, can't stop playing it. But just when Hope thinks she's rid the farm of the game, she finds herself addicted to the game worst of all.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can’t see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: The Triangle Part 1
programme.desc: A shipping magnate hires four experts from various fields to investigate what happened to his ships that went missing in the Bermuda Triangle. The team discovers a threat that might unravel time itself and cause the world to end.

programme.title: The Triangle Part 2
programme.desc: A shipping magnate hires four experts from various fields to investigate what happened to his ships that went missing in the Bermuda Triangle. The team discovers a threat that might unravel time itself and cause the world to end.

programme.title: The Triangle Part 3
programme.desc: A shipping magnate hires four experts from various fields to investigate what happened to his ships that went missing in the Bermuda Triangle. The team discovers a threat that might unravel time itself and cause the world to end.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.desc: Chainsaws spark fires, and when a blaze hits the Forever Claim, Jared must make a call whether to end the season early.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier (S10)
programme.desc: An unprecedented new chapter kicks off on the homestead as the Kilchers film themselves coping with Alaska's stay-at-home order amid a growing pandemic.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot (New Zealand's Fjordland), Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Squad W

It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Live and Die in East LA
programme.desc: After treating a boy injured in a hit-and-run, ER doctor Attila is drawn into East L.A.’s underworld conflict. The boy is the son of a crime lord, and the “accident” was gang revenge. To save his sister from prison, Attila becomes a drug courier, igniting a gang war that forces a tragic choice.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When Theresa's mom uncovers a pile of Theresa's childhood memorabilia, it inspires Theresa to do the same in her attic, a room she's too scared to enter.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Family is Theresa's cornerstone, which is why connecting people to their loved ones is her life's mission. In a reading she's never shared before, Theresa delivers healing messages to her son's friend.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets. Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Inspired by the judges’ family food traditions, six contestants face elimination as they must create dishes that represent their own special family food traditions.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael loves gazpacho, a cold soup made from raw vegetables that is perfect for warm Italian summers. She's holding onto the sunshine with her delicious recipe for green tomato gazpacho.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael's friends Leida and Veina show how to make three types of Albanian pizza, a rustic dish made with phyllo dough filled with beef, chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a teenage girl places her baby up for adoption, she learns that her daughter has gone missing from the adoptive parent's home. In her search for answers, she uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Inspired by the judges’ family food traditions, six contestants face elimination as they must create dishes that represent their own special family food traditions.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Dalene and Pete have lived a nomadic life for many years and want to find an oceanfront home to put down roots while still sparking their creativity. Will they be able finally to settle down?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: After a fun day, it’s time to fill up! Before heading to the restaurant for their first meal in Singapore, the friends play the Dokbak game for the first-day transportation fee.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Touched by the heartfelt advice of special judge Jin Goo, some actors are moved to tears. But before they can recover from the emotional moment, the final mission at the Casting House is announced.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar receives a tip on a home in the Palm River, so he and Amanda head over to scope it out. Even though the home has suspect additions and termite damage, Dolmar feels the deal is too good to pass on.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Inside each Mystery Box is one of five spectacular fruit shaped desserts made by Aussie content creator, Catherine Zhang. Inspired by the desserts, the Top 20 have 75 minutes to create a fruit dessert.

programme.title: The Face I Can't Forget
programme.desc: After waking from a car accident with total amnesia, Mia is taken home to be cared for by her loving husband and daughter. But as she recuperates, Mia has flashbacks of a second daughter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Inside each Mystery Box is one of five spectacular fruit shaped desserts made by Aussie content creator, Catherine Zhang. Inspired by the desserts, the Top 20 have 75 minutes to create a fruit dessert.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sautéed greens.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: When a seller whips into the shop with an 'Energy Dome' hat made for the band DEVO, will Rick's offer top the charts? Then, Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: Brimming with a perspective of Taiwanese cuisine, Chris returns to his restaurant, Yumpling, based in New York. Joined by Yumpling’s co-founders, Chris dives into the stories behind Yumpling’s creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: A scientist and businessman team up to develop a vitamin C-rich war ration for the troops fighting in World War 2, which unexpectedly leads to the development of frozen concentrated orange juice.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: From a coastal cleanup plan that ends with an earth-shaking surprise to a fugitive’s fiery fix for an unexpected problem, these are the real-life moments when people thought way outside the box.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: There are some strongholds built to protect the sacred. But there are others used for more sinister purposes. In this episode, we uncover the stories behind some of the world's most imposing structures.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: In L.A., Mike and Robbie head back to a fifth-generation demo business and junkyard that's piled so deep that most of its treasures are out of reach.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime needs to reach the airport in Coron, but first, she must scale a cliff, dive for wrecks and get past a herd of stubborn cows.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime arrives in Batanes and is introduced to the unique culture of the Ivatan tribe with a mad dash for a cow!

programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang’s masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this “young” auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Shaolin Abbot
programme.desc: Monk Chi San is sent by his Shaolin Master to learn a special kung fu skill from a Wu Dang priest. He gets embroiled in a fight between the Qing and Ming camps along the way, and has to gather disciples to rebuild the burnt Shaolin temple at the same time.

programme.title: Black Ransom
programme.desc: Mann, an accomplished police officer, has allowed his career to wane after his wife was murdered by the mafia. However, Mann is forced to return to his former glory when he is assigned to investigate a former police inspector suspected to be kidnapping mafia bosses and demanding ransoms in exchange for their lives.

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: Invincible Enforcer
programme.desc: A young man is at the wrong place at the wrong time. As he offends a police inspector, he is thrown into jail and even when released, the police goes after him until he has no choice but to become a real criminal. Only a kind and beautiful probation officer is on his side, but can she help him?

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect’s rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the “Empress of the Day”, only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect’s founder, the “Emperor of the Night”, who reveals that he is Tie’s biological father.

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: Legend of the Bat
programme.desc: It is rumoured that people can buy anything they desire on the mysterious Island of Bats so long as they have money. The charismatic swordsman Chu Liu Xiang and his friend travel to the island to seek answers but realize they are not the only ones who want to unveil the mystery of this place.

programme.title: Somewhere Street A Short Stroll
programme.desc: A 15-minute spin-off of the "Somewhere Street" series, "A Short Stroll" explores cities through a traveler's eyes. Today, we visit Johor Bahru, Malaysia.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5Min.
programme.desc: Niigata's Sanjo City is considered the birthplace of curry ramen. A metalworking city, it also produces ramen utensils!

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to eye. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: 30 We sang songs and danced together. Say you did several things at the same time by using the "tari" form of a verb. "Utattari odottari" means "to sing and dance."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: As a series in Culture Crossroads, BOSAI: BE PREPARED provides practical knowledge to save yourself from natural disaster. In this episode, we learn how to evacuate from flood and rainstorm.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World Japan
programme.desc: In July, NHK WORLD-JAPAN focuses on Yamaguchi. "Hit the Road" presents its history, environment and food. "Design x Stories" shows creative potters. And "Dive in Shimonoseki" looks at a unique city.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #2 Summer
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: 1/27: People Without Smartphones
programme.desc: 1 in 27 people don't own a smartphone. We follow a man who chose not to own one, and his reason not to. What has he gained in life by giving up his smartphone, a modern-day necessity and obsession?

programme.title: The Masterpieces Of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period. This episode takes a close look at artist Utamaro's iconic "Woman with a Glass Noisemaker."

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Nagira Kohei's received a high commendation in the People's Choice Award category at the prestigious Wildlife Photographer of the Year competition. What does he hope to convey through his work?

programme.title: Trails To Oishii Tokyo 10Min.
programme.desc: Eggplants nasu take the spotlight. Enjoy juicy mizu-nasu and melt in your mouth Kamo nasu. From traditional shojin ryori to sweets, discover the surprising range of Japanese eggplants.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Sudden Shower
programme.desc: Caught in an evening shower, Edo townspeople scramble across a bridge in search of shelter. On the river beyond, a lone figure steers his boat, unfazed by the rain. What is his destination?

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Ultraviolet radiation levels are rising every year--and with them the risks to our health. We look at the dangers of UV overexposure and what we can do to protect ourselves and our children.

programme.title: Seasoning The Seasons
programme.desc: This program visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan 15Min.
programme.desc: A series showcasing the stunning landscapes featured in Cycle Around Japan. This time: the varied, beautiful scenery of Nagasaki. Discover the Goto Islands, and their history of "hidden Christians."

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: A large-scale study in Japan has shown that improving one's diet and lifestyle can slow the progression of chronic kidney disease. Clinical trials in regenerative medicine are also underway.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: A Different Kind Of Fish
programme.desc: Sweet-bean-paste-filled taiyaki in the auspicious shape of a seabream or Tai. The Japanese have loved these sweet treats for over 100 years.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The temple chefs make corn rice and kakiage tempura. These simple summer delicacies give you a taste of the refreshing sweetness of corn.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your
programme.desc: Climate change is causing heavy rainfalls, emergencies that force dams to release water. This episode looks at dam upgrades being made in response.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change The World
programme.desc: With about 28 times the warming effect of CO2, methane lies in an ice-like form beneath the seabed. Rising sea temperatures dissociates it, releasing methane gas. How do we stop this time bomb?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Shugendo, a unique spiritual tradition, dates back 1,300 years. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show its practitioners and Kumano's sacred forests, long associated with death and rebirth.

programme.title: All About The Beans
programme.desc: A 100-year-old cafe born out of the friendship between Brazil and Japan. Coffee there is so great that it was even loved by superstar John Lennon.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The temple chefs ask their neighbor from the foot of the mountain to teach them how to make a special dish using homegrown goya.

programme.title: Titans S1 5
programme.desc: When the Nuclear Family tracks them down, Dick, Kory, Rachel and Gar decide to stop running and work together, and the team that will be known as "The Titans" is formed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 10
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colors with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: ER S2 1
programme.desc: Greene hires a new chief resident, Dr. Kerry Weaver. New medical students invade the ER. Carter returns with a new position. Benton and Jeanie become intimately involved.

programme.title: Smallville S2 10
programme.desc: While dirt-biking with Pete, Clark falls into a cave and discovers ancient Native American inscriptions that may hold the key to his identity.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 11
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin head to the casino to see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for overcoming snoring and sleeping through the night.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 12
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin explore hacks that could save money on your cable bill, and Hack Master Kosta Grammatis helps Kevin fulfill his childhood laser-blast dreams. Plus, there's an ancient Egyptian hack!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 7
programme.desc: Not to brag, but we've got 20 of the World's Dumbest Show Offs and they're about to take center stage. From a bikini babe crushing melons with her thighs, to a spectacular car crash and a dance routine that leaves nothing to the imagination... they all crave attention, and they get plenty from our cast of hilarious comedians, including Mike Britt, Rachel Feinstein, and Gilbert Gottfried.

programme.title: ER S2 1
programme.desc: Greene hires a new chief resident, Dr. Kerry Weaver. New medical students invade the ER. Carter returns with a new position. Benton and Jeanie become intimately involved.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S8 1
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. And tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 11
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 12
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: ER S2 2
programme.desc: Lewis clashes with the new chief resident; Ross treats a child pyromaniac; Hathaway rides ambulance duty with a handsome paramedic.

programme.title: Smallville S2 11
programme.desc: Whitney Fordman (former series star ERIC JOHNSON) returns home from a tour of duty with the Marines, hoping to renew his relationship with Lana.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 13
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke are having dinner in a hot tub… yup, it's exactly what you think. And it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, in the new Saved by the Hacks, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 14
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin learn ways to game the system with parking, and the Lazy Cook returns with a recipe for bringing old mac and cheese back to life. Plus, Senora is not the portrait of good behavior in a new Hacks Del Corazon.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 8
programme.desc: Don't touch that remote, it's time for 20 of the World's Dumbest TV Shows... from Brazilian cross dressers and out-of-control bounty hunters, to a reverend who curses up a storm, insane mixed martial arts, and the cheesiest superhero ever to pretendto fly. With hilarious commentary from comedians like Jared Logan, Judy Gold, and Chris Fairbanks.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 2
programme.desc: Arch-enemies drop their guard to team up against a new threat. Then, it's back to the future when Desert Dan risks all on a tire and a hunch. And later, blades are drawn, fragile alliances crumble, and the buyers let nothing stand in the way of winning big.

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get ballsy while posing as salesmen, and then try to outdo each other as they invade the personal space of confused strangers. And tonight's loser is up against the ropes, playing dress-up for an unruly arena.

programme.title: Friends S7 13
programme.desc: Phoebe becomes involved with a suicidal office worker.Rachel breaks Joey's favorite chair.Monica's beloved childhood belongings are destroyed.

programme.title: Titans S1 6
programme.desc: Dick reluctantly teams with the new Robin, Jason Todd.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected Baltimore-based twenty and thirtysomethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep murky waters of married life trying to read the signs of the opposite sex - and hoping to be the exceptions to the no-exceptions rule. Gigi just wants a man who says he'll call - and does - while Alex advises her to stop sitting by the phone. Beth wonders if she should call it off after years of committed singlehood with her boyfriend Neil but he doesn't think there's a single thing wrong with their unmarried life. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband Ben who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward no-sparks standby Conor who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary who's found an entire network of loving supportive men just needs to find one who's straight.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.desc: Teams travel more than 2,000 miles from Vietnam to India where they must balance traditional pots on their heads while performing a folk dance, and assemble a life-size, three-dimensional mural.

programme.title: Long Bright River (Season 1)
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey’s hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman’s bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas. A Christmas revelation helps Mickey get closer to the truth about Kacey but drives a wedge between her and Gee.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 1)
programme.desc: After one of New York’s most sought-after plastic surgeons is found dead, Elsbeth has her eye on the victim’s former boss, Dr. Vanessa Holmes, who she believes has motives that are more than skin-deep.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: Lieutenant Grey and the FBI task force enlist the help of an old colleague to uncover a criminal network; while Nolan, Miles, Lucy and Celina respond to a mysterious officer involved shooting.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When a lieutenant's water-logged body is discovered with a potential connection to an international smuggling ring, NIS Panama agents are called in to assist, and Gibbs comes face-to-face with an old nemesis: Special Agent Dwayne Pride.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: The team is drawn into the mystical world of fortune telling when a tarot card is found near a drowned U.S. Naval officer depicting the exact manner of his death.

programme.title: Long Bright River (Season 1)
programme.desc: As Mickey confronts the consequences of naming Paula, she reconnects with her family. A new development in the Jimmy Scanlon disappearance leads Mickey and Truman to surprising but familiar places.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: After a man is stabbed by an intruder who left no trace of a break-in, Rex’s senses reveal it was only a practice run for a scheme that goes much deeper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: It’s Valentine’s Day, and the team is on the hunt for someone who is setting more than hearts on fire. Meanwhile, Celina thinks Miles’ recent string of bad luck is the result of a curse, and she’s determined to break it.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When the NIS Regional Director tries to transfer Mary Jo, she reconnects with an old friend from Atlantic City to help investigate the roadside deaths of two Marines.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: When an undercover operation led by Special Agent Nina Chase goes sideways, the team works together to flip their only witness to help them hunt down a rip crew at a cartel wedding.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 7)
programme.desc: While training with Long Beach SWAT, Street discovers a biker club has stolen a cache of armor-piercing bullets and brings 20-Squad into the hunt for the gang before they can pull off a daring and deadly heist.

programme.title: Audra's Eat, Roam, Relish
programme.desc: Audra Morrice journeys to the colourful island state of Sarawak, Malaysia where she indulges in a cultural feast for the senses via its rich gastronomy. Audra explores Malaysian roots through food, family and local culture.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Melissa Mackay brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Escaping an abusive past, Jennifer moves into Apartment 212 for a fresh start, only to wake each day with painful bite marks. She soon discovers an ancient parasite that feeds on human flesh lurking within the walls. As attacks intensify, she must confront a nightmare more terrifying than her past before it consumes her.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When a respected Cleveland doctor goes missing, a chilling investigation into his fractured family explodes into a 12-hour standoff and a brutal truth that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A shooting suspect begins cutting himself with a pocket knife after investigators leave him alone in the interrogation room; a woman breaks down after telling police that she drowned her grandmother.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A man breaks down sobbing after admitting to stabbing his mom; an actress tells detectives how and why she shot her estranged uncle; a suspected murderer tries to broker an immunity deal; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died

programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A man in Modesto was apprehended by a K9 unit while fleeing from police; another was arrested while his family dog was bleeding in their backyard.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: Remi has to accept the consequences of his acts and the fact that only time can heal the pain he'd known in the past.

programme.title: Serieux ?
programme.desc: Marie-eve and Mathieu have a big sort out and decide to organise a rally to avoid the contents of their dustbins ending up as land-fill. Centres to deposit your waste, to sort it for recycling and for recycling electronic waste...

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Skate Le Monde
programme.desc: Mathieu Cyr visits England where skateboarding is seen as a sport, a means of social change and an economic driving force. From London to the Isle of Wight, he discovers a country which has developed its own skateboarding culture.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set their heading for the drowned village of Minnewanka Landing, Alberta, to explore its remains.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'Actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events.
